title: Villager Cycle Trading
description: Villager Cycle Trading is a lightweight Paper plugin that lets players easily cycle through a villager's trades without needing to break and replace their job site block.
body:
Villager Cycle Trading (Alpha) is an extremely lightweight Paper plugin that enables players to cycle a villager’s trades right from the trading UI! No longer will you have to break and lay back down your job site blocks!

When a player opens a villager trading GUI, it will display a special compass item. Tapping this compass will allow the villager to receive new trades, as if a workstation had been placed.

This plugin is in alpha so expect updates and changes. Feedback is welcome!

🔧 Features

Adds a click-to-cycle compass to the trading UI to easily cycle trades.

Configurable via config.yml:

Toggle trade cycles permission (permission-based trade cycling).

Choose whether cycling consumes an emerald.
